data.title: Fix cache lock file path: usage-cache.lock not usage-cache.json.lock
data.description:
## Description

Fix the lock file path in check_usage.py. Currently line 186 constructs lock_path as cache_path + ".lock" which yields ~/.cache/claude/usage-cache.json.lock. The done definition requires ~/.cache/claude/usage-cache.lock.

Fix: Change lock_path construction to use os.path.join(os.path.dirname(cache_path), "usage-cache.lock") or equivalent. Update tests accordingly.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/check_usage.py (modify)
- tests/scripts/test_check_usage.py (modify — update flock test assertions)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Lock file is at usage-cache.lock not usage-cache.json.lock
  Verify: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; import sys; sys.path.insert(0, 'plugins/dso/scripts'); exec(open('plugins/dso/scripts/check_usage.py').read().split('if __name__')[0]); assert 'usage-cache.lock' in (CACHE_PATH.rsplit('.json',1)[0] + '.lock') or True"
- [ ] All 16 unit tests pass
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test_check_usage.py --tb=short -q
- [ ] Integration tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-check-usage.sh
